positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a nocturnal cityscape skyline silhouette. The buildings should be varied in height and angular, rendered in deep indigo and slate gray tones. The composition must feature a strong central focus with a negative space cutout effect above the buildings. Introduce a vibrant, abstract pop-art gradient wash of neon cyan, electric magenta, and lime green radiating from behind the skyline, suggesting a glowing sunset/sunrise through the atmosphere. Use clean, sharp vector line art combined with flat color blocking for a modern, graphic look. Ensure high contrast between the dark silhouettes and the bright color wash. Perfect for T-shirt printing, highly scalable, clean edges, vibrant colors, pop-art style, flat design, symmetrical balance.
negative: text, typography, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, deformed, noise, grain, abstract watercolor, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic, photographic, complex shading, dirty, messy lines
